title: Termination of the accreditation of the Securities Dealer Representative Licence of Mr. Markos Solomou (SDR236)
text: The Financial Services Authority (“FSA/Authority”) hereby gives notice to the general public, pursuant Section 4(1)(m) of the Financial Services Authority Act, 2013 (“FSA Act”), the accreditation of Mr. Markos Solomou as the Representative of TOB Trading Ltd has been terminated, effective as of December 31st, 2025.
